mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_member ( project_id, user_id, member_role, del_flag, join_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{memberRole}, 0, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE del_flag = 0, member_role = VALUES(member_role), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT pm.id, pm.project_id AS projectId, pm.user_id AS userId, pm.member_role AS memberRole, pm.join_time AS joinTime, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.phone, u.email FROM project_member pm LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pm.user_id = u.id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY pm.join_time ASC
